title: More Vanilla potions
description: Adds potions and tipped arrows for effects that don't normally have such.
body:
Ever wanted a levitation potion to reach really high or a splash potion of blindness to blind your friends? This simple mod adds potions, splash potions, lingering potions and tipped arrows for many effects that normally don't have such.
 
The recipes of the potions added so far:

**levitation**:
<details>
  
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
water bottle+shulker shell

</details>


**mining fatigue**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+prismarine shard

</details>


**resistance**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+copper ingot

</details>


**health boost**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+golden apple

</details>


**glowing**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+glow ink sac

</details>

 
**haste**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+amethyst shard

</details>


**nausea**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+pufferfish

</details>


**blindness**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+ender eye

</details>


**withering**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

water bottle+wither rose

</details>
